CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2021 Set For Trial On Jan-24-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Entry Of Default Against Defendants Phuong Pham And Tp Pham Llc
Off Calendar Feb-18-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jennifer Choi (415-554-3887; Jennifer.Choi@sfcityatty.org), deputy city attorney for Plaintiff.
George Wolff (415-788-1881; george@wolfflaw.com) for Defendants.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs PHUONG PHAM, TP PHAM LLC's Motion To Vacate Entry Of Default Against Defendants Phuong Pham And TP Pham LLC:

Defendants Phuong Pham and TP Pham LLP's amended motion to vacate entry of the default entered against them on September 29, 2020, is granted. The complaint in this action was filed on July 22, 2020, and was personally served on defendants on July 31, 2020. Defendants filed their motion to vacate entry of default on January 8, 2021, more than three months after entry of default. Under ordinary circumstances, that delay might be considered unreasonable. (See, e.g., Stafford v. Mach (1998) 64 Cal.App.4th 1174, 1184 [delays of three months or more routinely result in denial of relief where there is no satisfactory explanation for the delay].) Here, however, Defendants show that after they retained counsel in late October, they were engaged during November and December in providing information to the City Attorney's office regarding Defendant Pham's health conditions in an attempt to persuade the City to stipulate to set aside the default. (Wolff Decl., pars. 1-4.) Although Defendants' factual showing is weak and their moving papers are deficient in that they have not included a proposed answer, in light of the policy favoring adjudication of cases on their merits, the motion is granted. Defendants shall file a verified answer or other responsive pleading within 10 days of the Court's order.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
